body: I think that this should close #760.
title: Use openmpi for parallel hdf5 output support in long runs

body:
This PR refactors `linsolve!` by:
 - Moving the matrix verification test to a separate file, which should really be / become a test (I'll add an issue)
 - Moving the warning condition outside of column loop
 - Moves the transform `x *= dtγ` inside the column loop to increase work per thread (when it's used)
 - Adds `call_verify_matrix`, which is used to determine if we perform the matrix verification test can be used to help pass JET tests

Ultimately, I'd like to split `linsolve!` into `linsolve_threaded!` and `linsolve_unthreaded!` (where the former calls the later).
title: Refactor linsolve
